steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The question asks which choice “most effectively contrasts” the two moons’ orbits. Contrast requires showing a difference. The notes give one clear difference: Oberon takes 13.46 days per orbit; Miranda takes only 1.41 days.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — Miranda orbits many times faster than Oberon: directly contrasts the two moons using the orbital-period data. ✓
  • Choice B: generalizes about orbital laws without comparing the two moons. ✗
  • Choice C: invents orbital shapes that the notes do not mention. ✗
  • Choice D: generalizes about laws without comparing the two moons. ✗
That matches choice A — A is correct.
